raw_consumer_statement:
I am a long term credit card holder from Barclays ( XXXX XXXX ). I disputed a charge from XXXX ; they initially credited the amount but have subsequently added the charge back. I am including the letter and some of the correspondence with XXXX, which I provided to Barclays. I can not wrap my brain around them not agreeing with this being a fraudulent charge. Please help! 

Below is the letter I sent to the dispute department at XXXX XXXX ( Barclays ). 

Re : XXXX & XXXX To Whom It May Concern : I am including correspondence with XXXX, a company that purports to offer XXXX ( weight loss ) services. We were attempting to obtain medication for my son, XXXX XXXX. It quickly became clear to me that they were not a reputable company. I asked them to cancel the account on XX/XX/year>. They persisted in trying to charge me, and I told Barclays repeatedly that the charges were fraudulent. Even so, they somehow managed to charge me twice. I am respectively but firmly requesting these charges be denied and removed from my account. I had to cancel my card because of this, and that has wreaked havoc as more than a dozen merchants have contacted me to update my account information.
